mapper.sql: image_id, tenant_id, project_id, plan_id, object_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, etag, sha256, uploaded_by_account_id, uploaded_by_user_id, status, create_time, bound_at
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_repair_narrative_image WHERE image_id = #{imageId} AND status = 'DRAFT'
